## Editing.EditorContextValidator class

Validating wrapper for EditorContext. Provides methods that accept raw (unknown) input, validate using converters, and delegate to the base editor context. Follows the ResultMapValidator pattern from ts-utils.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class EditorContextValidator<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> implements IEditorContextValidator<T, TBaseId, TId> 
```
**Implements:** [IEditorContextValidator](./ts-chocolate.editing.ieditorcontextvalidator.md)<!-- -->&lt;T, TBaseId, TId&gt;
